description_long: This object is a decorative sword with a matching sheath, both featuring a dark, metallic finish. The sword has a straight, double-edged blade with a pointed tip, and a crossguard adorned with ornate, gold-colored detailing and a central red jewel. The handle is cylindrical, ending in a rounded pommel with additional metallic embellishments. The sheath is similarly dark and metallic, with a matching decorative cap at the opening. The overall design suggests a ceremonial or fantasy-inspired weapon, rather than a utilitarian tool.
description: A dark, ornate sword with a jeweled crossguard and matching sheath, featuring gold accents and decorative details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sword and sheath side by side, highlighting the jeweled crossguard and the pointed blade.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the sword and sheath, emphasizing the straight blade and cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the crossguard and pommel, with the sheath positioned beside the blade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the full length of both sword and sheath, with decorative details visible on the handle and guard.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, metallic with decorative pommel and possible grip texture
attribute_ornamentation: gold detailing, central red jewel, decorative pommel and guard
